  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

AAP CAN H45ph2 V1.1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74E
Recv ID: 76E
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0E
Func Name: Aide au parking

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "12",
    "supplier": "AFK",
    "soft": "0019",
    "version": "5050"
  }
]

    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "5700000000",
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "710200",
    "sentbytes": "310200",

    "sentbytes": "21A0",

    "deny_sds": [],

        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 5,

      },

        "ref": true
      },
      "Offset outer sensors": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
